title: Department Manager Vacancy at McDonald's India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at McDonald's India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
McDonald's India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Department Manager to join our dynamic team in Delhi. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About McDonald's India:
McDonald's India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with McDonald's India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
